title: Smile Pretty Cure!: Ehon no Naka wa Minna Chiguhagu!
original_title: 映画 スマイルプリキュア！ 絵本の中はみんなチグハグ！
overview: The movie transports the Precure into a world inside a picture book, where they are guided by Niko, a mysterious inhabitant of the picture book world.
